ads.author: Kat Ann
ads.title: Namco Crisis Zone
ads.description: FOR SALE Namco Crisis Zone The game powers up but nothing comes on the screen. It worked fine one day, then didn't. We're not monitor experts and have no experience working on monitors. Need it gone. Will not ship. Located in Evans, GA (30809). It's big and heavy. Easy in and out of building for loading. $1,500 Here's a summary of the game from AI. Crisis Zone (1999) is an intense, action-packed arcade light-gun shooter by Namco and a spin-off of the Time Crisis series. Players control Claude McGarren, an elite STF agent, utilizing a mounted submachine gun (Steyr Mannlicher TMP) and a foot pedal system to take cover, reload, and destroy massive, highly destructible environments while battling terrorists in a 3D urban setting. Key Features and Gameplay: Unique Controller: Instead of a pistol, players use a mounted submachine gun with 40-round capacity and a laser sight. Cover Mechanism: A foot pedal allows players to take cover, acting as both a reload function and a shield against enemy fire. Destructible Environments: Players can destroy the environment, including shooting CDs off shelves, breaking glass, and destroying clothing racks. Campaign Structure: The game features three main stages (Subway, Hotel, Commercial Zone) that can be played in any order, followed by a final boss stage. Action-Oriented: The game is known for high-intensity, rapid-fire gameplay, often featuring faster enemy encounters than the standard Time Crisis. Crisis Zone is powered by Namco System 23 hardware and typically features 27-inch CRT or 50-inch projection displays.

ads.title: Vintage Capcom MAGIC SWORD Arcade Game (1990)
ads.description: Selling a vintage MAGIC SWORD arcade game by Capcom. This game was assembled from a New Old Stock (NOS) Kit by local resto expert (Mitch N) around 2015. The monitor is also a NOS monitor with maybe 250 hours on it total. The only thing missing on this is the clear plexiglass over the monitor and bezel, but since it's in my private home collection, it isn't a big deal to me. Game is available for ground-level pickup at my home in Gainesville, GA 30506. Asking $1,000 OBO and I'm open to trades.

ads.author: Erin Svendsen Meyer
ads.title: Police Trainer Classic Arcade Game
ads.description: Classic Police Trainer Arcade Game with police Vector light bar and strobes in great condition. This is an original Police Trainer arcade machine made in 1997. Everything works great including the blue lights which you can turn on and off independently. Police Trainer is a target shooting simulation game that takes 1 or 2 players through a series of levels created to help develop skills such as accuracy, speed, decision making, etc., as you compete for high scores. This game has been a lot of fun for our family and friends. It is all target shooting so there's no blood or actual violence; rated for mature responsible ages and individuals. This arcade machine is big and very heavy. If you need it delivered, text me and we might be able to work it out depending on delivery location. Dimensions: H=80in, D=40in, W=32in Asking $1500 but will entertain REASONABLE offers. If you lowball, I won't respond. If you have something to trade, text me and let me know. eight four three five one four nine nine seven five

ads.author: Steve Larmon
ads.title: Atari Red Baron Vector Arcade Game Project
ads.description: Atari Red Baron Vector Arcade Game, with complete Boardset. This is a rare original game from 1979, its a good project for a vector game fan. Mostly complete, mostly in good condition. There is some cabinet damage at the lower back rear. This boardset is still in the cabinet, and appears to have never been removed. All screws and cable ties are still in place. Very clean, all original. No mold, no smell, no cigarette burns. Missing the monitor, marquee, foot rest, and some of the joystick handle pieces. Does have the back door, coin box with lid, owners manual and all service and schematics. Overlay is great, side art is good. Unable to test as the monitor is missing. $700 bucks Thanks Also... located in Chattanooga, available for pickup anytime or can help with shipping.

ads.author: Allen Robinson
ads.title: P.O.W. Prisoners of War, Upright Arcade, SNK 1988
ads.description: Vintage Upright Arcade – P.O.W. Prisoners of War (SNK, 1988) Price: $325 Own a piece of late-80s arcade history! This is an original P.O.W. – Prisoners of War upright cabinet from SNK, released in 1988. Known as a classic scrolling fighter / beat ’em up, players battle their way through enemy compounds after escaping captivity. It’s a gritty, action-packed title that helped define the genre and remains a nostalgic favorite for collectors. Condition: - Cabinet is very old and needs a lot of love. - Boards need work and likely new caps. - Monitor powers on but the image quality is poor. - Lights come on. - No sound currently. - This is a project cabinet — ideal for restoration enthusiasts. Highlights: - Rare SNK beat ’em up from the golden age of arcades. - Upright cabinet with authentic late-80s design. - Great candidate for restoration or display in a retro collection. Important: - Sold as-is. - Serious buyers only. No I don’t deliver but it can be picked up or shipped (arranged by buyer) in Powder Springs, GA.

ads.author: Allen Robinson
ads.title: Pole Position, Upright Arcade, Atari/Namco 1982
ads.description: Vintage Upright Arcade – Pole Position (Atari/Namco, November 1982) Price: $400 Step into racing history with this original Pole Position upright cabinet — one of the most iconic arcade racers ever made. Released in 1982 by Atari/Namco, Pole Position was a groundbreaking driving simulator that set the standard for racing games. It’s widely recognized as one of the Top 50 most historically important video games of all time. Condition: - Cabinet is very old and needs some love. - Boards need work and likely new caps. - Monitor does not power on. - Lights come on. - No sound currently. - This is a project cabinet — perfect for restoration enthusiasts or collectors. Highlights: - Classic upright racer with simulator-style gameplay. - Rare piece of arcade history from the golden age. - Great candidate for restoration or display in a collection. Important: - Price is negotiable, but only slightly. - Sold as-is. - Serious buyers only. No I don’t deliver but it can be picked up or shipped (arranged by buyer) in Powder Springs, GA.
